'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=ABgDfXI5jhSme6pkS7ephf1iLUfRZyfih_HqM28oFgg-1772220292-1.0.1.1-69G0JcnGxn7C4Gm8TyKoixZHugwNDzD4OG3OEAfymdA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
